graph_vector_fulltext.message: Hello! In the provided text, the Regulation is based on **Articles 16 and 114 of the Treaty on the Functioning of the European Union (TFEU)**.
graph_vector_fulltext.metric_question: On which two articles of the Treaty on the Functioning of the European Union (TFEU) is this Regulation based?
graph_vector_fulltext.metric_answer: Hello! In the provided text, the Regulation is based on **Articles 16 and 114 of the Treaty on the Functioning of the European Union (TFEU)**.
